name: forge-ide-extension
description: Forge IDE Chrome Extension for Codeforces

scripts.build: npx esbuild content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --target=chrome100 && npx esbuild popup.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js --format=iife --target=chrome100 && npx esbuild background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=esm --target=chrome100 && node build-copy.mjs
scripts.watch: concurrently "npx esbuild content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --target=chrome100 --watch" "npx esbuild popup.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js --format=iife --target=chrome100 --watch" "npx esbuild background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=esm --target=chrome100 --watch"
